title: 02 the street becomes a little set
prompt: Use case: identity-preserve. Asset type: cinematic storyboard transformation frame. Image 1 controls Tina's identity, wardrobe, product, car interior, camera, and live-action realism. Image 2 is the authority for the simple miniature music-video world, palette, lighting, small houses, palm trees, and suspended gummy fish. Preserve the foreground composition. Outside the window, the real street has flattened into a shallow handbuilt tabletop set: four simple coral and butter-yellow bungalow models, sparse palm miniatures, and a smooth painted turquoise cyclorama. Three translucent pink-and-white lychee gummy fish hang at different depths on visible fine monofilament. Only one fish has crossed the window plane into the car near Tina's shoulder. Keep ample empty space and let Tina notice the color and light rather than react broadly.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one frame from a coherent live-action Peelerz music-video commercial. Preserve Tina as the same young woman with long brown hair, blue jacket, black top, pink lychee gummy, and pink Peelerz package. The visual idea is deliberately simple: Tina remains photographic while the world outside becomes a small handbuilt tabletop set. Favor restrained production design, bold controlled light, tactile practical effects, visible fine suspension thread, and charming artificiality. No elaborate fantasy lore, giant creatures, underwater ocean, CGI spectacle, crowded candyland, captions, borders, or watermarks.
